title: osmanthus ilicifolius
intro: Osmanthus ilicifolius, also known as sweet olive or tea olive, is a plant species in the family Oleaceae, native to China and Taiwan, characterized by its fragrant flowers and leaves that resemble those of the holly tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are believed to help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Osmanthus ilicifolius include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Osmanthus ilicifolius is often used in tea infusions, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
